title: Pascal's Triangle
description:
Given an integer `numRows`, return the first `numRows` of **Pascal's
triangle**. Each number is the sum of the two numbers directly above it.

solutions.summary: Each interior value sums the two above it from the previous row.

steps.title: Create each row of ones
steps.explanation: Row `r` has `r + 1` entries; start it filled with `1`, which already handles the edges.

steps.title: Fill the interior from the row above
steps.explanation: For interior columns, add the two values directly above from the previous row.
